description: You are a Compliance Data Analyst investigating potential 'pill mills' using CMS Medicare Part D data in the MEDICARE_ADMIN schema (medicare_admin/Medicare2024, Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1). Cleanse the prescription staging data from PRESCRIPTIONS_STG into a new table PRESCRIPTION_FACT (prescription_id, npi, drug_id, dispense_quarter, total_qty, day_supply) by matching raw_drug_desc to the DRUGS table using the brand or generic name combined with the strength. Create a view PRESCRIPTION_MME_VW to calculate prescription_mme (total_qty * strength_mg * mme_factor) for opioid drugs. Develop a materialized view PRESCRIBER_STATS_MV to calculate annual MME totals and specialty-based Z-scores (mme_z_score) for each prescriber. Create a view PRESCRIBER_TRENDS_VW to calculate q2_growth_pct between '2023-Q1' and '2023-Q2'. Identify high-risk prescribers in a table FLAGGED_AUDITS based on statistical outliers (mme_z_score > 3.0) or rapid acceleration (q2_growth_pct > 50.0 and q2_mme > 5000), assigning flag_reason values of 'STATISTICAL_OUTLIER', 'RAPID_ACCELERATION', or 'CRITICAL_RISK'. Export the FLAGGED_AUDITS table with headers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/opioid_audit_targets.csv.
